summary: System Health Normalized API & Dashboard Testing - ALL PASSED. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All dashboard elements verified - normalized overview bar, 4 metric cards, 4 panel cards, 4 subsystem cards, all interactive buttons working.

minor.priority: LOW - does not affect core functionality

issues: WebSocket shows 'Offline' indicator - expected behavior as WS not configured

critical_code_review_comments: Normalized health API endpoints correctly return standardized fields: status, severity, scope_type, scope_id, last_updated_at, action_available, suggested_action, live_capable
Role-based dashboard correctly returns role, scope, panels shaped by user role (admin)

Service-wired endpoints (/api/arrivals/today, /api/unified/today-arrivals, /api/frontdesk/audit-checklist, /api/audit-logs, /api/logs/errors, /api/logs/night-audit) all working via frontdesk_service and night_audit_service
SystemHealthDashboard.js properly uses data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
All 4 subsystem cards (Channel Manager, Workers, Security, Observability) display correctly with status, severity, last_updated_at, live_capable

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI elements verified, all interactions working)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - using existing demo data
context_for_next_testing_agent: System Health Dashboard fully functional at /system-health route. All normalized health endpoints (/api/system-health/normalized/overview, /api/system-health/normalized/channel-manager, /api/system-health/normalized/workers, /api/system-health/normalized/security) return standardized health response envelopes. Role-based dashboard at /api/system-health/role-dashboard shapes data by user role. Service-wired endpoints for frontdesk and night_audit domains all working correctly.

backend_normalized_health: test_role_dashboard_endpoint - Returns role, scope, panels, tenant_id
test_normalized_overview_endpoint - Returns overall_status, overall_severity, subsystems (channel_manager, workers, security, observability)
test_normalized_channel_manager_endpoint - Returns status, severity, scope_type, last_updated_at, live_capable, action_available, suggested_action

4 metric cards verified: metric-cm-health, metric-queue-health, metric-alerts, metric-stuck-tasks
4 panel cards verified: Channel Manager, Queue & Workers, Security Runtime, Runtime Alerts
4 subsystem health cards verified: channel_manager, workers, security, observability
